pageContext.name: EPZ-003 GREAT SABRE MARKING PLUS Ver.
pageContext.description: The upgraded version of the Sabre Tiger, Great Sabre, joins the lineup with all-new decals and additions to the previous kit that will be sure to please fans!   From the High Mobility Flight Wing that has flexible joints allowing it to be easily poseable, to the reversible 8 Shot Missile Pod, this model kit is packed with accessories and weapons.   The bonus part head cockpit comes with a clear red and clear part to customize in any manner that the fans would like.   Be sure to add this Zoid created by the Zenebas Empire to your very own collection!
